name: Application
notes: Global application object represented by app in scripts.

name: Project
notes: Represents active project context and project-level operations.

name: ProjectItem
notes: Represents project-panel items including media and sequences.

name: Track
notes: Base track concept; split into video/audio/caption contexts.

name: TrackItem
notes: Timeline instance that references project item/media context.

name: Marker
notes: Marker object; scope must be documented.

name: Time
notes: Time abstraction; not interchangeable with timecode string.
